level_a_software.scope: buildable and locally proven release candidate

level_b_private_canary.scope: controlled approved-participant persistent-staging Stripe-test-mode no-value private canary

level_c_live_money.scope: real buyer charges, independently controlled suppliers, payouts, or public launch

source.candidate_binding: The final candidate is the GO-closure PR exact head. CI jobs independently assert that SHA; this ledger does not invent a self-referential precommit hash.
source.proof_binding_status: PRECOMMIT_PASS; the authoritative committed-candidate receipt is generated after commit and selected by exact HEAD outside this self-referential ledger

out_of_scope_p0: independently controlled supplier devices remain prohibited without contractual, location, egress, and attestation controls

weighted_score.p0_or_p1_override: any open target-scope P0 or P1 forces NO_GO
